DEADLANDS.Dialog.TraitRoll.Title: Trait Roll
DEADLANDS.Chip.GMOnly: Only the GM can draw Fate Chips for the session.
DEADLANDS.ChipRule.NoneLeft: No chips of that color remaining.
DEADLANDS.ChipRule.BustOnlyLegend: Only a Legend chip (reroll) can save a bust!
DEADLANDS.ChipRule.OnePerAction: Only one red, blue, or legend chip per action.
DEADLANDS.Guts.Label: Guts Check
DEADLANDS.Scart.Queasy.Note: Loses next Action Card; −2 to all rolls this round.
DEADLANDS.Scart.Willies.Note: Misses turn; −2 to actions until a recovery Guts check (TN same as original).
DEADLANDS.Scart.HeebieJeebies.Note: Loses entire turn; −2 for the rest of the encounter.
DEADLANDS.Scart.WeakKnees.Note: Flees or is incapacitated; −2 rest of encounter; recovery Guts check needed.
DEADLANDS.Scart.DeadFaint.Note: Faints if Wind reaches 0. Blessed must pass Onerous (7) faith or lose 1 faith level permanently.
DEADLANDS.Scart.MinorPhobia.Note: Weak in the Knees + gains a minor phobia (−2 when stimulus present). GM assigns.
DEADLANDS.Scart.MajorPhobia.Note: Weak in the Knees + gains a major phobia (−4 when stimulus present). GM assigns.
DEADLANDS.Scart.CorporealAlteration.Note: Minor Phobia + a physical defect (white hair streak, changed voice, etc.). GM assigns.
DEADLANDS.Scart.TheShakes.Note: Major Phobia + Hard (9) Spirit roll or Deftness reduced one step permanently.
DEADLANDS.Scart.HeartAttack.Note: Hard (9) Vigor roll. Fail: Vigor reduced + second Hard (9) Vigor or dies (Medicine TN 11 in 2d6 rounds). Die if Vigor < d4.
DEADLANDS.Scart.CorporealAging.Note: Heart Attack + ages 1 year. GM applies all Heart Attack consequences.
DEADLANDS.Combat.Card.Label: {rank} of {suit}
DEADLANDS.Combat.Initiative.Label: Card Initiative
DEADLANDS.Combat.Initiative.Bust: {name} went bust — no action cards this round!
DEADLANDS.Combat.Initiative.BlackJoker: {name} drew the Black Joker! Marshal draws a {chip} chip. Sleeve discarded. Deck reshuffles at round end.
DEADLANDS.Combat.Initiative.RedJoker: {name} drew the Red Joker! Draws a {chip} chip and may act at any time this round.
DEADLANDS.Combat.Initiative.NoSleeveJoke: Jokers cannot be kept up your sleeve.
DEADLANDS.Combat.Hand.Title: Action Hand: {name}
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Hexslingin.Label: Hexslingin'
DEADLANDS.Huckster.LastDraw.Label: Last Draw
DEADLANDS.Huckster.HexTable.Name: Name
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.HexSucceeds: The hex fires despite the backlash!
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.MysticSputte: Hex fails. Hexslingin' −1 level for 1d6 days.
Hex fails (if KO). 2d6 wounds to a random hit location.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.ScartCheck.N: Hex fails (if Willies+). Roll 2d6 on the Scart Table.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.HexTurnsOnCa: Hex fires — but targets the caster.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.CompanionWou: Hex fails (if companion KO). 2d6 to companion gut; Fair (5) Vigor or falls.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.CompanionWin: Hex fails (if companion KO). Companion −2d6 Wind; Fair (5) Vigor.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.TemporaryMad: Hex fires. Roll on Dementia Table. Hard (9) Spirit each week to recover.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.HexHitsCompa: Hex fires — but affects nearby companions instead of the target.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.HexBlocked.N: Hex fails. Cannot cast any hexes for 1 day.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.PersonalBack: Hex fails (if KO). 3d6 wounds to the body.
Hex fires. Random limb unusable for 1d12 hours (or exorcism).
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.ScartCheckHe: Hex fails. Roll 4d6 on the Scart Table.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.ItemDestroye: Hex fires. The manitou destroys or steals one of the huckster's possessions.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.WoundCurse.N: Hex fails (if KO). 2d6 wound; Wind heals 1 pt/hour; wounds +2 levels harder to heal.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.Madness.Note: Hex fails. Roll on Dementia Table — result is permanent.
DEADLANDS.Huckster.Backlash.TotalCorrupt: Hex fails. Opposed Spirit roll — on failure the manitou controls the body for 10 minutes.
